title: Untitled
notes: Checklist #1, Section 1 Prologue. Credit given in the MoMA Master Checklist as 'Lick Observatory' (institution, not an individual photographer); no nationality listed. Print size 120 x 89 cm. Title deprivation per CNA education portal; no title in checklist.

title: Untitled
notes: Checklist #2, Section 1 Prologue. Wynn Bullock, American. Print size 50 x 63 cm. Widely identified in secondary sources as Bullock's 'Let There Be Light' (1954); the MoMA Master Checklist itself does not record a title or date. The MoMA permanent-collection record for Bullock's 'Let There Be Light' is works/55534; identification with plate 2 is reported rather than verified plate-to-object.

title: Untitled
notes: Checklist #3, Section 1 Prologue. Credit reads: 'from "Art in the Ice Age"' — a book source rather than a single named photographer. Print size 20 x 17 cm. No photographer name or date in checklist.

notes: Checklist #6, Section 1 Prologue. The MoMA checklist skips numbers 5, 7, and 8 — whether this reflects withdrawn plates, reserved numbers, or internal edits is not stated in the document. Widely identified in secondary sources as Bullock's 'Child in Forest' (1951); MoMA permanent-collection record works/55598. Plate-to-object identification is reported rather than primary-verified.

See photo-0005 notes on the numbering gap — the MoMA Master Checklist uses numbers 1-4, 6, 9-50 (skipping 5, 7, 8) across plates 1-50 of its sequence, so we seed 47 CSV rows from the first 50 checklist numbers.
